brand.name: Shanta
brand.promise: Send what matters through people you can trust.

landing.headline: Send or carry a package.
landing.subhead: Pick one action and move fast. Shanta connects senders, travelers, agents, hubs, and receivers with the least friction possible.
landing.hubLoginHint: Hub operators can sign in from the link below.

auth.phoneSubtitle: Enter your phone number and we'll send you a verification code.
auth.errorInvalidPhone: Please enter a valid phone number in international format.
auth.errorInvalidCode: That code is incorrect or has expired. Please try again.
auth.errorRateLimited: Too many attempts. Please wait a while before trying again.

onboarding.title: What do you want to do?
onboarding.subtitle: Pick an action to get started. You can switch between send and travel anytime.
onboarding.sendDesc: I have something to send to another city.
onboarding.travelDesc: I'm travelling and have spare luggage space.

admin.title: Shanta Admin
admin.noAccess: You don't have access to the admin area.

trips.route: Which cities are you traveling to?

trips.kycDesc: Please verify your identity before publishing trips
